scripts.check: node ../scripts/generate-script-registry.mjs && pnpm run types:check && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json
scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply sub-store-cloudflare --local --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc
scripts.migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply sub-store-cloudflare --remote --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc
scripts.types: node ../scripts/generate-script-registry.mjs && wrangler types ./src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.jsonc --env-interface SubStoreEnv --include-runtime false --strict-vars false
scripts.types:check: wrangler types ./src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.jsonc --env-interface SubStoreEnv --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --check
